---
title: "Results of First Tests of Overnight Staining"
theme: darkly
author: "Cyrus Martinian"
date: 2026-06-24
toc: TRUE
---

# Results of Overnight Backbone Stain

![](/images/BB_ON_EnrichedT.png)

# Results of Overnight Full Panel Stains

## Full Panel Stain: Previously Tested Antibody Concentrations

## Full Panel Stain: Reduced Antibody Concentrations 

# Results of Single Color Controls

It appears that the cells used to make single color control samples were likely dead, as a result of being left at room temperature for 2-3 hours in only PBS. The following likely indicates non-specific staining.
